full_text:
Ding Feng 丁封
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Feng (丁封)was born in An Feng County, Lu Jiang (Presently He Qui, An Hui Province). Served Sun Xiu under Ding Feng with Sun Yi. Dispatched to aid Zhuge Zhan. Ding Feng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
